sections.heading: Project overview
sections.body: The installation is shown in its completed dining environment, making it possible to review furniture scale, spacing and its relationship with customer circulation.

sections.heading: What to notice
sections.body: Review lounge-seat placement, usable clearances and how upholstered volumes relate to the surrounding finishes.

sections.heading: Potential project value
sections.body: A coordinated furniture plan can support clearer circulation, a more consistent dining atmosphere and a guest environment that better reflects the operator's concept.
